name: Cozy Cat by the Window
subject: cozy
prompt: a round fluffy cat curled up asleep on a windowsill cushion with calm closed eyes, a window behind it with simple curtains, a small potted plant on the sill and a steaming teacup beside the cat

name: Cozy Reading Nook
subject: cozy
prompt: a snug reading nook with a plump comfy armchair, a soft blanket draped over the arm, a tall stack of books beside it, a small side table holding a steaming mug, and a leafy hanging plant above

name: Hot Cocoa and Blanket
subject: cozy
prompt: a big steaming mug of hot cocoa topped with three round marshmallows, nestled inside a chunky knitted blanket with a folded edge, a candy cane resting against the mug, and a few little stars and a crescent moon floating around

name: Cup of Tea and Cookies
subject: cozy
prompt: a delicate teacup on a saucer with a tea bag tag hanging over the rim and gentle steam curling up, a small plate of three round cookies beside it, a tiny spoon, and a few scattered sugar cubes

name: Cat Napping on a Sweater
subject: cozy
prompt: a content sleeping kitten curled into a tight ball on top of a folded chunky knitted sweater, eyes closed with a peaceful smile, a tiny tail tucked around its nose, and a soft ball of yarn resting nearby

name: Crackling Fireplace
subject: cozy
prompt: a brick fireplace with a glowing fire and stacked logs inside, a wooden mantel above holding a small clock and two candlesticks, a pair of stockings hanging from the mantel, and a couple of logs piled on the hearth

name: Chunky Knitted Sweater
subject: cozy
prompt: a thick folded knitted sweater shown close up, with a chunky cable-knit pattern across the front, a ribbed collar and cuffs, neatly folded sleeves, and a few little hearts and snowflakes worked into the design

name: Rainy Day Window
subject: cozy
prompt: a view of a rainy window with rounded raindrops trickling down the glass, simple curtains pulled to the sides, a steaming mug sitting on the sill next to a small potted plant, and a soft folded blanket draped on the ledge

name: Stack of Books and Candle
subject: cozy
prompt: a neat stack of four closed books with ribbon bookmarks peeking out, a lit candle in a small jar resting on top with a gentle flame, a tiny pair of reading glasses leaning against the books, and a sprig of leaves beside them

name: Warm Socks by the Fire
subject: cozy
prompt: a pair of thick fuzzy knitted socks with folded cuffs and a fair-isle pattern, set side by side, a steaming mug between them, and a few little hearts and snowflakes floating above the toes

name: Bowl of Warm Soup
subject: cozy
prompt: a deep round bowl of soup with gentle steam rising and round vegetable pieces floating on top, a spoon resting in the bowl, a folded napkin underneath, and a thick slice of crusty bread on a small plate beside it

name: Lit Candle and Flowers
subject: cozy
prompt: a chunky pillar candle with a soft glowing flame standing in a small dish, a curl of smoke drifting up, a tiny vase of three simple flowers beside it, and a folded book and a teacup nearby on a calm tabletop
